HEADING: Check your email
DESCRIPTION: Your shop already has an existing FastComments account. To switch that account to Shopify billing, we need confirmation from the account owner.
SENT_TO_PREFIX: We sent a confirmation link to
SENT_TO_SUFFIX: . Open the email and click the confirmation button to complete the switch.
EXPIRY_NOTE: The link expires in one hour.
NO_EMAIL_NOTE: If you don't receive the email, check your spam folder. If the email is wrong or you don't have access, reach out to FastComments support.
